Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Street Machine.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $cc00 lda #$3e sta $01 jsr $cb00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Street Machine.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $CB00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
